message.content:
CPU, GPU, and TPU are all types of computing processors used in AI and machine learning applications. Each has its own unique architecture and use cases, making them suitable for different types of applications.

CPU (Central Processing Unit) is the most common type of processor used in modern computers. It is responsible for executing instructions and performing calculations. CPUs are often used in smartphones, laptops, and other portable devices. They are also used in gaming consoles, as they are capable of handling complex calculations and graphics processing.

GPU (Graphics Processing Unit) is a specialized type of processor that is designed for handling graphics-intensive tasks. It is used in video games, 3D rendering, and other applications that require high-quality graphics. GPUs are typically used in gaming consoles, as they are capable of handling complex calculations and rendering graphics.
